instruction: Write a short tweet about AI replacing developers in a sarcastic tone.
Summarize the benefits of solar energy globally in 2 sentences.
Write a professional LinkedIn post about finishing a machine learning internship.
base_generated_text:
{
  "task": "finish_machine_learning_internship",
  "content": "Thank you for your interest in the machine learning internship at <company_name>. We are excited to have you join our team and learn from some of the best minds in the industry. Our team is dedicated to building the best machine learning programs, and our internship program will provide you with valuable experience and mentorship. We are thrilled to say that you will have the chance to work alongside some of the industry's most innovative and talented individuals. Don't miss out on this incredible opportunity to gain valuable skills and connect with amazing people. Thank you again for your interest in our internship program at <company_name>.",
  "tone": "professional",
  "format":

instruction: What is the capital of France and what is its population?
Write a cold email to a recruiter for a data science role emphasizing python skills.
base_generated_text:
{
  "task": "cold",
  "content": "Hi <recipient_name>,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am reaching out to consider an opportunity for the position of <position> at <company_name>.

I am looking for someone with experience in <skill_set> using <language>. I have found <relevant experience> and would like to provide my resume and cover letter for your review.

Thank you for considering my application.

Best regards,
[Your Name]"
}

Note: The skills listed may not be exhaustive, but they are important for the role.
